nbaNews.title: NBA awards: Bontemps' ballot for MVP, top rookie, every honor

nbaNews.title: 'It's all basketball': LaMelo says no rift with Bam
nbaNews.summary: LaMelo Ball of the Charlotte Hornets says he's relieved that Miami Heat star Bam Adebayo wasn't more hurt after the run-in with Ball in the second quarter.

nbaNews.title: Brazil basketball legend Oscar Schmidt dies at 68
nbaNews.summary: Oscar Schmidt, the Basketball Hall of Famer whom his Brazil compatriots know as the "Holy Hand," died on Friday. He was 68.
